'''zhadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gracing|gracing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gracing|gracing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhadhaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhædhækæth|zhædhækæth]] || [[word:zhædhækæj|zhædhækæj]] || [[word:zhædhækæsh|zhædhækæsh]] || [[word:zhædhækæ|zhædhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadhadhakath|zhadhadhakath]] || [[word:zhadhadhakaj|zhadhadhakaj]] || [[word:zhadhadhakash|zhadhadhakash]] || [[word:zhadhadhaka|zhadhadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadhakath|zhadhakath]] || [[word:zhadhakaj|zhadhakaj]] || [[word:zhadhakash|zhadhakash]] || [[word:zhadhaka|zhadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadhafkath|zhadhafkath]] || [[word:zhadhafkaj|zhadhafkaj]] || [[word:zhadhafkash|zhadhafkash]] || [[word:zhadhafkaf|zhadhafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhadhakatha|zhadhakatha]] || [[word:zhadhakaja|zhadhakaja]] || [[word:zhadhakasha|zhadhakasha]] || [[word:zhadhakaka|zhadhakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhadhakath|zhadhakath]] || [[word:zhadhakaj|zhadhakaj]] || [[word:zhadhakash|zhadhakash]] || [[word:zhadhaka|zhadhaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhadhakathal|zhadhakathal]] || [[word:zhadhakajal|zhadhakajal]] || [[word:zhadhakashal|zhadhakashal]] || [[word:zhadhakakal|zhadhakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhadhakathatha|zhadhakathatha]] || [[word:zhadhakajaja|zhadhakajaja]] || [[word:zhadhakashasha|zhadhakashasha]] || [[word:zhadhakaka|zhadhakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhadhakathan|zhadhakathan]] || [[word:zhadhakajan|zhadhakajan]] || [[word:zhadhakashan|zhadhakashan]] || [[word:zhadhakakan|zhadhakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhadhakathaoro|zhadhakathaoro]] || [[word:zhadhakajaoro|zhadhakajaoro]] || [[word:zhadhakashaoro|zhadhakashaoro]] || [[word:zhadhakakaoro|zhadhakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
